seo.title: Our Process | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Learn how Maxima Pools installs your fiberglass pool from start to finish. Transparent, efficient, in-house process — serving Columbus, OH and Central Ohio.
seo.ogDescription: From first consultation to your first swim — see how Maxima Pools delivers a seamless pool installation experience.

hero.subtitle: From your first call to your first swim — here's how we turn your backyard into a paradise, step by step.

stepByStep.intro: Every Maxima Pools project follows a proven, transparent process. Here's what to expect when you work with us.

steps.title: Phone Consultation
steps.description: We talk over the phone to discuss your vision, budget, and pool model options to see if we are a good fit.

steps.title: Site Visit
steps.description: We visit your home to check the ground, take measurements, and look at access points for the equipment.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: We give you a clear, itemized price quote and a project timeline based on your yard and choices.

steps.title: Contract
steps.description: We review and sign the paperwork together so everyone is on the same page before we begin.

steps.title: Deposit & Order Shell
steps.description: You make the initial deposit, and we officially order your San Juan fiberglass pool shell from the factory.

steps.title: Permitting & Drawings
steps.description: We handle the paperwork, draw up the plans, and submit everything to your city to get the required building permits.

steps.title: Delivery Day & Pool Build Begins
steps.description: Your pool shell arrives, our crew starts digging, and we begin building your pool.
